since_last: 36% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.94%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -1.17% · Gold +1.73% · Nasdaq100 -0.30%. 36% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.94%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.94%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +21.37%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +21.37%, DELL +9.04%, NRG +5.40%, CEG +4.71%, HPE +3.47%. Laggards: PATH -13.37%, GEV -7.45%, AI -6.52%, PLTR -6.47%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.78% at $117.63
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
